title: Lesson 265: (Grammar) - to give; to receive; to do for (giving and receivi...

intro_cards.title: Giving & Receiving: あげる・もらう・くれる
intro_cards.body:
Japanese has three verbs for giving/receiving based on who gives and who receives:

あげる — I/we give to someone else:
• 友達にプレゼントをあげました。
(I gave a present to my friend.)

もらう — I/we receive from someone:
• 友達にプレゼントをもらいました。
(I received a present from my friend.)

くれる — someone gives to me/my in-group:
• 友達がプレゼントをくれました。
(My friend gave me a present.)

Key: the speaker is always the reference point.
These extend to te-form: てあげる / てもらう / てくれる.
